households.name: Okafor family
households.situation: Post-surgery meals and transport after hospital discharge.
households.summaryNote: Family is grateful but overwhelmed. Daughter can coordinate evenings only.

notes.author: Prayer desk
notes.body: Prayer call completed Monday night and transport needs were confirmed for discharge day.

notes.author: Mercy team
notes.body: Meal captain confirmed two drop-offs and a volunteer pharmacy run for Tuesday afternoon.

households.name: Williams household
households.situation: NICU schedule is creating childcare and fatigue pressure at home.
households.summaryNote: Mom prefers text check-ins. Grandmother is available for daytime support.

notes.author: Meal coordinator
notes.body: Two meals were delivered over the weekend and another family offered Wednesday dinner.

households.name: Adeyemi siblings
households.situation: Job loss and rent strain, with benevolence paperwork now submitted.
households.summaryNote: Good engagement so far. Main need is clarity and emotional steadiness.

pastoralNeed.title: Job loss checkpoint
pastoralNeed.detail: Benevolence is in motion, but encouragement and next-steps coaching are still needed.
pastoralNeed.nextStep: Pair a deacon and marketplace mentor for a Friday follow-up call.

notes.author: Finance deacon
notes.body: Budget review completed Sunday afternoon and documentation is ready for benevolence approval.

households.name: Daniels household
households.situation: Conflict at home requires pastoral counseling and close follow-up.
households.summaryNote: Handle carefully and keep communications tight between staff and leaders.

pastoralNeed.title: Marriage crisis escalation
pastoralNeed.detail: A small-group leader requested same-day follow-up after a late-night conflict.
pastoralNeed.nextStep: Pastor Bayo to call before 6:30 PM and log the outcome tonight.

notes.author: Small-group lead
notes.body: Shared a same-day concern after a difficult night at home and requested pastoral follow-up.

households.name: Akinola family
households.situation: Grief support and funeral logistics after an unexpected loss.
households.summaryNote: Family responds well to in-person visits and practical help.

pastoralNeed.title: Funeral planning support
pastoralNeed.detail: The family needs a pastor present for home prayers before visitors arrive.
pastoralNeed.nextStep: Assign the Thursday evening visit and confirm the prayer team lead.

notes.author: Care host team
notes.body: Home prayer visit completed Monday evening and the family asked for help with hosting.

households.name: Mensah household
households.situation: Single parent needs after-school help during a schedule change.
households.summaryNote: A neighborhood volunteer may be a good fit if screening is completed quickly.

notes.author: Sunday response team
notes.body: Request was logged after service and needs an owner before Wednesday review.

requests.summary: Hospital discharge moved forward and the freezer is empty.
A new baby and a NICU visit schedule are stretching both parents thin.
Rent support request is ready for finance approval and follow-up prayer.
Small-group leaders flagged a conflict that needs same-day pastoral care.
